name: compliance sync mechanism: creates one folder under generated-code-quality-standards/<jurisdiction>/ per catalog entry (G-9.1 sync)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us-government
  applicable_to: [ai-systems]
  identifier_scheme: nist-framework
  why_authoritative: |
    Federal mandate.
    Widely adopted.
    Authoritative US AI source.
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/sync-from-sources.sh" --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" && test -d generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/nist-ai-rmf && echo ok 1>&2
